title: BetterFire
description: A Texture Pack That Adds Better & Low Fire To The Game! 🔥
body:
🔥 BetterFire 🔥
Clean and Cool Low Fire Texture Pack for Minecraft!

🎯 Features:

Low Fire for better PvP visibility

Clean And Low Fire

Brighter and smoother animations

Works great with shaders

FPS-friendly design

Supports 1.21+

Works with OptiFine & Fabric

Perfect for PvP, Survival, or just a better look 🔥💥
